title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0079 515-517 Stockwood Road, Brislington, Bristol City, Bristol, BS4 5LR
body: "Type of application:  Outline planning permission with some matters reserved  Applicant name:  Stockwood Land Ltd  Site address:  515-517 Stockwood Road, Brislington, Bristol City, Bristol, BS4 5LR  Description of proposed development:  Outline application for the erection of a six-storey building comprising 9 no. self-contained flats (Access, Layout, Scale, and Appearance to be determined)  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 18 February 2025   Date by when representations must be made 21 March 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 15 April 2025   Decision date 14 April 2025     Decision    Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 138 KB, 8 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 21 March 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0079 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     250203 Cover Ltr PR01662 S62A  (PDF, 380 KB, 7 pages)  Application Form  (PDF, 1.14 MB, 15 pages)  cil questions  (PDF, 810 KB, 6 pages)  CMRA Report 732959_Part1  (PDF, 20.3 MB, 57 pages)  CMRA Report 732959_Part2  (PDF, 11.5 MB, 9 pages)  CMRA Report 732959_Part3  (PDF, 12.3 MB, 10 pages)  Design and Access Statement  (PDF, 23 MB, 32 pages)  Draft UU PR01662 9-Units CIL  (PDF, 1000 KB, 7 pages)  Energy Statement 9 units 2025  (PDF, 528 KB, 8 pages)  Ground Investigation Report_Part1  (PDF, 9.43 MB, 263 pages)  Ground Investigation Report_Part2  (PDF, 10.6 MB, 20 pages)  Ground Investigation Report_Part3  (PDF, 7.95 MB, 7 pages)  Ground Investigation Report_Part4  (PDF, 7.66 MB, 5 pages)  Ground...
